prerequisites: A Churnkey account with Data API access. Data API access must be requested by contacting Churnkey for your organization.
A Churnkey Data API key (distinct from the Cancel Flow API key), found in the Churnkey dashboard under Settings > Account.
Your Churnkey application ID (the x-ck-app value), found in the Churnkey dashboard under Settings > Account.

authMethods.name: API key (x-ck-api-key header)
authMethods.summary: Churnkey's Data API authenticates with a data API key sent in the x-ck-api-key request header, alongside your application ID in the x-ck-app header. The connector's api_key secret field supplies this Data API key (format data_...). This key is distinct from the Cancel Flow API key, so use the Data API key. Set content-type to application/json on requests.

setupSteps.title: Request Data API access
setupSteps.body: The Churnkey Data API requires access to be enabled for your organization. Contact Churnkey to request Data API access before generating or using credentials.

setupSteps.title: Locate your API key and App ID
setupSteps.body: Sign in to the Churnkey dashboard and open Settings > Account (https://app.churnkey.co/settings/account). Copy your Data API key (format data_...) and your application ID. Make sure you use the Data API key, which is distinct from the Cancel Flow API key.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Set the api_key field to your Churnkey Data API key and set the x-ck-app field to your application ID. The connector sends these as the x-ck-api-key and x-ck-app headers (with content-type: application/json) on every request.

sources.title: Churnkey Data API (authentication headers, credential location)
